primary_sources.title: HTML Living Standard — Tracking user activation
Web Audio API — allowed to start

finding: Sticky user activation records historical interaction, while transient activation is time-limited and can be lost before a gated audio invocation. Evidence must therefore capture activation at handler entry and again at the exact audio invocation, not merely record that a click occurred.
design_implication: Instrument the direct audio-start handler with synchronous navigator.userActivation snapshots before any await, timer, task, or indirection. Preserve the exact resume/play settlement separately from render, route, and physical audibility evidence.

verification.environment: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files

uncertainty: Browser user-activation telemetry is browser-visible state. It does not establish that audio rendered, reached an output route, produced acoustic energy, or was heard.
privacy_boundary: The evaluator accepts categorical timing and outcome metadata only; it requires no identity, raw audio, health information, private chat, or device fingerprint.
falsification_route: Capture handler-entry and invocation-time activation snapshots from the same trusted event on the target device, retain the exact invocation result, and compare the classification with render-position, output-route, and physical-observation evidence. A mismatch falsifies the proposed diagnosis of activation loss.
